proposal.hypothesis: The exact Mission reaches a qualified stand, but the recovery child keeps advancing and reclassifies the pose during the two-second cross-fade. Freezing the last qualified recovery Action should make the handoff causal and prevent a second recovery maneuver from opposing locomotion.
proposal.expectedEffect: Move exact Missions from recovery through settling into locomotion without a recovery pose change, improve signed post-recovery progress and planar settling, and preserve all isolated self-righting and recovery-handoff gates.
